creator: pmh@hausen.com
text:
Sorry folks, I was travelling over the weekend end promptly fell sick after returning on Monday.

Latest patch still looks good:

-------
smsc0 on uhub1
smsc0: <vendor 0x0424 product 0xec00, rev 2.00/2.00, addr 3> on usbus1
smsc0: MAC address found in bootargs b8:27:eb:2a:0c:1c.
smsc0: chip 0xec00, rev. 0002
miibus0: <MII bus> on smsc0
smscphy0: <SMC LAN8700 10/100 interface> PHY 1 on miibus0
smscphy0:  10baseT, 10baseT-FDX, 100baseTX, 100baseTX-FDX, auto
ue0: <USB Ethernet> on smsc0
ue0: Ethernet address: b8:27:eb:2a:0c:1c
-------
